function.name: manageSkill
function.description: Create or update a DialogueSystem skill by writing its manifest, SKILL.md instructions, and optional tool definitions. Runtime code is disabled for managed skills.

SkillInstructions.description: Optional SKILL.md body instructions. If omitted, instructions are generated from description, usage rules, examples, and tools.

RuntimeCode.description: Deprecated and disabled. Do not provide runtime.py source code for managed skills.

Enabled.description: Whether the skill should be enabled.

AllowedTools.description: Optional tool names that should become pre-approved while this skill is activated.

DisableModelInvocation.description: If true, the model cannot auto-activate this skill unless the user explicitly names it.

UserInvocable.description: Whether the skill should be exposed for direct user invocation surfaces.

Paths.description: Optional workspace path patterns that limit when the skill may auto-activate.
